zh.Norbury, Greater London, England, United: 英國英格蘭倫敦諾波利
zh.Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭爾南特維其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Hyde於大約1304年出生在英國爾諾波利時，他的父親Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury34歲，母親Margaret Davenport30歲。他於1327年與Elizabeth Stavelegh在英國爾諾波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1401年在英國英格蘭倫敦諾波利享年98歲。

zh-hans.Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰爾南特維其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Hyde于大约1304年出生在英国爾諾波利时，他的父亲Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury34岁，母亲Margaret Davenport30岁。他于1327年与Elizabeth Stavelegh在英国爾諾波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1401年在英国英格兰倫敦諾波利享年98岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hyde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of various places so called in Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Hampshire, and Middlesex. They were named with Old English hīd ‘hide (of land)’, a variable measure of land, differing from place to place and time to time, and seems to have been originally fixed as the amount necessary to support one (extended) family (Old English hīgan, hīwan ‘household’). The surname may also be topographic for someone living on (and farming) a hide of land. The Hyde family has been in Leinster, Ireland, since the early 13th century and one family has been established in the county of Cork since the 16th century. The name was Gaelicized as both Dalaithíd and de hÍde. Compare Hyder .

variants.name: Dollarhide
meanings: Irish: possibly an altered form of de la Hyde (see Hyde ), which was a prominent surname in Leinster from medieval times onward. Compare Dollahite .

History: Francis Dollahide, born c. 1650–60 in County Dublin, Ireland, was the ancestor of Americans with the surname Dollahide, Dollahite, and Dollarhide. In 1680 he was transported to MD for some youthful misdemeanor. He appears to have been an educated man and rose to be an important landowner and politician, serving in the Lower House of the MD legislature as an elected representative for Baltimore County from c. 1705 to 1721.

variants.name: Hyder
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): status name or topographic name for one who lived on or possessed a hide of land, from Middle English hide + the locative suffix -er. This is a characteristically southeastern English name, synonymous with Middle English atte hide elsewhere (see Hyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘light; beauty; prosperity’, also ‘rank, power, royal majesty’, a byname of the goddesses Lakshmi and Saraswati. Also widely used as an honorific title.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Hyde was born about 1304, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury, was 34 and his mother, Margaret Davenport, was 30. He married Elizabeth Stavelegh in 1327, in Norbury, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1401, in Norbury, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 98.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Hyde est né environ 1304, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret Davenport, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Stavelegh en 1327, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1401, à Norbury, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 98 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Hyde um 1304 in Norbury, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury 34 und seine Mutter Margaret Davenport 30. Er hat 1327 in Norbury, Cheshire, England Elizabeth Stavelegh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1401 im Alter von 98 Jahren in Norbury, London, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Hyde è nato il circa 1304 nel Norbury, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Davenport, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Stavelegh nel 1327, nel Norbury, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1401, nel Norbury, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 98 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Hydeが約1304年にイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norburyは34歳，母Margaret Davenportは30歳であった。1327年にイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーでElizabeth Staveleghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1401年にイギリスイギリスロンドンノーブリーで98歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Hyde(이)가 대략 1304년 영국 체실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Davenport(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1327년 영국 체실르 노르버이에서 Elizabeth Stavelegh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1401년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 노르버이에서 98세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Hyde nasceu aproximadamente 1304, em Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Davenport, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Stavelegh em 1327, em Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1401, em Norbury, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 98 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Hyde родился около 1304 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Davenport, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Stavelegh в 1327 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1401 г. в местности норбури, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 98 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert de Hyde nació aproximadamente 1304, en Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret Davenport, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Stavelegh en 1327, en Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1401, en Norbury, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 98 años.
